title: Tech CU Selects Upstart for Personal Loans and Auto Refinance Loans
text: Upstart continues to expand its financial institution partnerships. Tech CU selected Upstart for personal loans and auto refinance loans, demonstrating continued demand for Upstart's AI-powered lending platform among credit unions. Partnership Expansion: This represents continued momentum in Upstart's efforts to expand its partner base and bring AI-powered lending solutions to more financial institutions. The partnership highlights the value proposition of Upstart's platform for credit unions looking to modernize their lending operations and leverage AI for underwriting decisions. Growth Strategy: In Q1 2026, Upstart demonstrated strong growth with originations up 61% year-over-year and revenue up 44% year-over-year to $308.2 million. The company is also expanding its product offerings with auto and home lending products showing particularly strong growth. Long-term Outlook: For 2026, Upstart is projecting $1.4 billion in revenue and $294 million in adjusted EBITDA, representing a 21% margin. The company continues to execute on its strategy of expanding its partner base while diversifying into new lending verticals.
